name: Kappa | Baby Fever!
description:
Kappa has baby fever... What will you do about it?

"That Sluggi baby was the cutest thing in the world! I've always wanted kids..."

——————————————————

After a Sluggi mother let Kappa hold and play with her son, his heart ached to have a child of his own. Will you help?
